title: GGSGH Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 06 Senior Resident Posts
description: The Guru Gobind Singh Government Hospital (GGSGH) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 06 Senior Resident Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, DNB, PGDM, and Post-graduation can apply for the GGSGH Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit...
